# Version 3.119.4
> **GTK4, Tizen and platform reach** · Released May 22, 2026 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.119.4) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v3.119.4)

> **Supersedes [3.119.3](3.119.3.md)** · Rolls up preview-only work that was never released as stable — those changes are included cumulatively below.

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.119.4/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/8.3.1.5/index.md)

## Highlights

3.119.4 adds SkiaSharp.Views.Gtk4, Tizen x64/arm64 natives, Linux Bionic assets, and refreshes the AoT/Windows/Apple story. It ships on the .NET 10 SDK, hardens Windows and Linux natives, fixes an AoT crash and a MAUI Android tab-switch regression, and rebuilds libpng, libwebp and brotli.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this release.*

## API Surface

- **New SkiaSharp.Views.Gtk4 package** — Adds SkiaSharp.Views.Gtk4 built on the GirCore Gtk-4.0 bindings, giving GTK4 apps a first-class SKDrawingArea/SKGLArea host. ([#3527](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3527))

## Bug Fixes

- **MAUI Android SKGLView survives tab switches** — SKGLView now re-renders correctly after a MAUI TabBar switch on Android. — ❤️ [@SimonvBez](https://github.com/SimonvBez) ([#3076](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3076))
- **AoT and Linux ARM64 crashes fixed** — SkiaSharp no longer crashes at startup on NativeAOT builds compiled with IlcDisableReflection=true, and the Linux ARM64 native library now bundles fontconfig correctly. ([#3485](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3485), [#3494](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3494))
- **GTK4 and WindowsForms fixes** — Fixes a Cairo assertion crash in the GTK4 SKDrawingArea, and switches the WindowsForms controls to use the DesignMode property directly. ([#3562](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3562), [#3614](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3614))
- **Direct3D 12 delay-load** — D3D12 DLLs are now delay-loaded so the library keeps starting on systems without DirectX 12 installed. ([#3633](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3633))

## Platform

- **Tizen and Linux Bionic** — Adds Tizen x64 and arm64 native builds (Studio 6.1) and Linux Bionic native assets, and splits the Tizen native CI into per-architecture jobs. — ❤️ [@4Darmygeometry](https://github.com/4Darmygeometry) ([#3620](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3620), [#3619](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3619), [#3217](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3217), [#3672](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3672))
- **tvOS device/simulator split** — Splits the tvOS native builds and NativeReference targets into separate device and simulator frameworks, matching the iOS packaging. ([#3561](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3561), [#3563](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3563))
- **.NET 10 SDK and net48** — Builds on the .NET 10 SDK with workload version-set pinning, and adds a net48 full-framework target for Windows validation via PolySharp. — ❤️ [@4Darmygeometry](https://github.com/4Darmygeometry) ([#3514](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3514), [#3631](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3631), [#3642](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3642))

## Lifecycle & Internals

- **SKManagedStream refactor** — SKManagedStream now uses an SKData snapshot instead of a parent/child chain, simplifying its lifetime and fixing subtle disposal ordering issues. ([#3589](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3589))

## Security

- **Native dependency refresh** — Updates libpng to 1.6.58 (via 1.6.54), libwebp to 1.6.0 and brotli to 1.2.0, and enforces -Wl,--no-undefined on Linux and Android native builds to catch missing symbols at link time. ([#3723](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3723), [#3452](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3452), [#3478](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3478), [#3469](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3469), [#3629](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3629))
- **Windows and Linux native hardening** — Enables the Spectre mitigation flag on both libSkiaSharp.dll and libSkiaSharp.so. — ❤️ [@sshumakov](https://github.com/sshumakov) ([#3496](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3496), [#3502](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3502))

## HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.1.5

HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.1.5 picks up the same Tizen, Linux Bionic and .NET 10 packaging work, plus the Spectre mitigation on both Windows and Linux natives.

## Preview 1 (April 22, 2026)

The 3.119.4 preview line collected the SkiaSharp.Views.Gtk4 package, Tizen x64/arm64 support, Linux Bionic assets, the .NET 10 SDK move, the SKManagedStream refactor, the AoT/ARM64 fixes and the libpng/libwebp/brotli refresh.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.119.3-preview.1.1...v3.119.4-preview.1.1)

## Preview 1 (February 7, 2026)

The 3.119.3 preview was a servicing round: native-dependency refreshes (libwebp 1.6.0, libpng 1.6.54, brotli 1.2.0, libexpat 2.7.3), Spectre-mitigation build flags, and AoT and Linux ARM64 crash fixes.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.119.2...v3.119.3-preview.1.1)
